transcript: Customer: Hi, this is Mark Henderson. I'm calling because my shower valve keeps running. Dispatcher: Hi Mark, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a AO Smith, an older one, 15 years. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 9 Lakeview Drive. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out Wednesday afternoon. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

expected_entities.equipment: AO Smith shower valve, an older one, 15 years
